title: 4 Pieces Empty 200ml Silver Aluminium Lotion Pump Bottle, Aluminum Bottles with LOCK Clip, Travel Metal Bottles for Cosmetic Shampoo Body Washing Gel Essential Oil Liquid Dispenser
features: ☺【Package Inlucdes】--- 4 Pieces 200ml silver aluminum bottles with white gel pump and lock on clip, 1 Piece Funnel.
☺【Portable Size】--- Bottle measures Ø 48 mm x 186 mm height including the pump. The aluminium pump bottles can be put into a Makeup bag, or carry-on luggage for use at home or on-the-go.

☺【Material】--- The pump bottles are made of aluminum and are therefore rust-free. The pump head is made of durable plastic. The inside of the bottle is coated with an epoxy resin layer to prevent the container from reacting with the filling items.
☺【Pump Head】--- High-quality screw-on pump head. The lock on clip can lock the pump, it keeps pump from accidentally spraying in luggage or while stored.
☺【Applicable】--- The small aluminum bottles with lotion pump meet all your needs for storing Homemade Shampoo, Liquid Soap, Body Wash, Shower Gel, Massage Oil, Hand Lotion and Skin Creams etc.
description: Features: 1. Empty aluminium bottles with screw-on pump,refillable. 2. Spring loaded design keeps pump from accidentally spraying in luggage or while stored.
